headline: Netflix Taps Warner Music Partnership To Expand Music Documentary Pipeline
summary: Netflix (NasdaqGS:NFLX) and Warner Music Group have entered an exclusive multi year partnership to create documentary series and films based on WMG artists and songwriters. The agreement focuses on long form music related programming, including behind the scenes stories and career spanning profiles. For Netflix, which operates a global streaming platform built around subscription video on demand, this deal adds another content stream tied to well known music talent. It comes as music...
